Package de.uka.ilkd.key.api

Class ProofManagementApi

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.api.ProofManagementApi
public class ProofManagementApi extends Object
This class serves as a facade to all functionalities that are needed for proof management, i.e., loading proof files, retrieving the proof obligations

    • getProofContracts

      public List<Contract> getProofContracts()
      Retrieve a list of all available contracts
      Returns:
      List<Contract>; can be null if no file was loaded before (we should throw an exception here)

    • getRuleNames

      public Set<String> getRuleNames()
      Constructs a set containing all names of a taclets that are registered in the current environment.

      The result is cached to speed up further calls.s

      Returns:
      always returns a non-null hash set.
